conversation_context.content:
Here are some open data sets about the economy of Cyprus in 2023:

1. **2023 GDP Data of Cyprus**
   - Description: Contains quarterly GDP data of Cyprus in 2023.
   - Format: JSON
   - [Dataset Link](https://data.cyprus.gov.cy/dataset/gdp-2023)

2. **2023 Unemployment Rate Data of Cyprus**
   - Description: Monthly unemployment rate statistics in 2023.
   - Format: JSON
   - [Dataset Link](https://data.cyprus.gov.cy/dataset/unemployment-rate-2023)

3. **2023 Inflation Rate Data of Cyprus**
   -

The dataset has been successfully downloaded. Here are some samples of the unemployment rate data in Cyprus in 2023:

- **January 2023**: The unemployment rate is 7.5%
- **February 2023**: The unemployment rate is 7.4%
- **March 2023**: The unemployment rate is 7.3%
- **April 2023**: The unemployment rate is 7.2%
- **May 2023**: The unemployment rate is 7.1%

You can download the full dataset through [this link](https://data.cyprus.gov.cy/dataset/unemployment-rate-2023).
Download the other two as well. Then, I also want to know what has been recently released in Germany and Sweden.

analysis: Multi-tool task 'Parallel Multi-Tool' expected 5 actions: ['downloadDataset', 'downloadDataset', 'getLatestDatasets', 'getLatestUpdates', 'prepare_to_answer']. Model produced 4 tool calls: ['downloadDataset', 'downloadDataset', 'getLatestDatasets', 'getLatestUpdates']. Subcategory: Schema Error in Sequence.
